parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Program
participant V4L2
participant "Bridge CX3" as Bridge
participant "Camera OV5640" as Camera

== Initialization ==
activate Program
Program -> V4L2 : 1 OpenDevice(/dev/video0)
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> Bridge : 2
activate Bridge
Bridge -> Camera : 3
activate Camera
Camera --> Bridge : 4
Bridge --> V4L2 : 5
V4L2 --> Program : 6
Program -> V4L2 : 7 InitDevice()
V4L2 -> Bridge : 8
Bridge -> Camera : 9
Camera --> Bridge : 10
Bridge --> V4L2 : 11
V4L2 --> Program : 12

== Test ==
Program -> V4L2 : 13 SetParameter(valueA)
V4L2 -> Bridge : 14 valueA
Bridge -> Camera : 15 valueA
Camera --> Bridge : 16
Bridge --> V4L2 : 17
V4L2 --> Program : 18
Program -> V4L2 : 19 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> Bridge : 20
Bridge -> Camera : 21
Camera --> Bridge : 22 value
Bridge --> V4L2 : 23 value
V4L2 --> Program : 24 value
note left: value must be equal to ValueA
Program -> V4L2 : 25 StartStream()
V4L2 -> Bridge : 26
Bridge -> Camera : 27
Camera --> Bridge : 28
Bridge --> V4L2 : 29
V4L2 --> Program : 30
Program -> V4L2 : 31 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> Bridge : 32
Bridge -> Camera : 33
Camera --> Bridge : 34 value
Bridge --> V4L2 : 35 value
V4L2 --> Program : 36 value
note left: value must be equal to ValueA
Program -> V4L2 : 37 SetParameter(valueB)
V4L2 -> Bridge : 38 valueB
Bridge -> Camera : 39 valueB
Camera --> Bridge : 40
Bridge --> V4L2 : 41
V4L2 --> Program : 42
Program -> V4L2 : 43 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> Bridge : 44
Bridge -> Camera : 45
Camera --> Bridge : 46 value
Bridge --> V4L2 : 47 value
V4L2 --> Program : 48 value
note left: value must be equal to ValueB
Program -> V4L2 : 49 StopStream()
V4L2 -> Bridge : 50
Bridge -> Camera : 51
Camera --> Bridge : 52
Bridge --> V4L2 : 53
V4L2 --> Program : 54
Program -> V4L2 : 55 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> Bridge : 56
Bridge -> Camera : 57
Camera --> Bridge : 58 value
Bridge --> V4L2 : 59 value
V4L2 --> Program : 60 value
note left: value must be equal to ValueB

== Destruction ==
Program -> V4L2 : 61 CloseDevice()
V4L2 -> Bridge : 62
Bridge -> Camera : 63
Camera --> Bridge : 64
destroy Camera
Bridge --> V4L2 : 65
destroy Bridge
V4L2 --> Program : 66
destroy V4L2
destroy Program
@enduml
```
